pages.text: Travel has 4 core tiers. Item IDs and book names match exactly: kubejs:travel_core_t1, kubejs:travel_core_t2, etc.

$(li)$(item)kubejs:travel_core_t1$() gates: waystones:waystone, waystones:warp_stone, waystones:warp_scroll
$(li)$(item)kubejs:travel_core_t2$() gates: waystones:warp_plate, compactmachines:new_machine_tiny, compactmachines:new_machine_small
$(li)$(item)kubejs:travel_core_t3$() gates: compactmachines:personal_shrinking_device, compactmachines:new_machine_normal
$(li)$(item)kubejs:travel_core_t4$() gates: compactmachines:enlarging_module, compactmachines:new_machine_large
